description_long: This object consists of two large, rectangular metal storage containers placed side by side. Both containers have corrugated steel walls and are painted in a dark brown color, with visible weathering and some surface dents. The left container features a significant dent or deformation along its top edge, while the right container appears more intact. The sides of the containers display embossed or printed text, likely indicating a company or manufacturer, and the tops are ribbed for structural strength. The containers are closed, with no visible openings, handles, or locking mechanisms on the exterior. These containers are typical of those used for industrial storage or shipping in urban environments, such as construction sites, warehouses, or loading docks.
description: Two large, brown, corrugated metal storage containers with visible dents and embossed text, typical of industrial or shipping use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow ends of both containers, with the left container's top edge visibly deformed.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of both containers, with embossed text and the left container's wavy top profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the ribbed tops and the left container's deformation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the containers' length, with the right container appearing more intact and the left showing a dented lower edge.
